title: Implement per-bullet state storage in BulletSnapshot.state Map with Codec

reference_files.reason: Three-tier ownership - per-bullet storage carrier (BulletSnapshot.state), no persistence, bullet lifetime only
BulletSnapshot structure - existing stats/traits fields, new state field, getShooter/getGunInstanceUuid for backtracking
Persistence table - per-bullet not persisted, syncs initial values via BulletS2CPacket

acceptance_criteria: BulletSnapshot.state field (Map<ResourceLocation, Object>) added with StateValueCodecs dispatch Codec
State map Codec correctly serializes/deserializes mixed value types for BulletS2CPacket initial value sync
State map defaults to empty map when no states written
BulletSnapshot is mutable at runtime (hooks can modify state during flight via setState)
State map is not part of initial attribute snapshot freeze (separate from stats/traits)
